title: Architecture/code drift inicial y cierre de Baseline Industrial Mínima
wave: Ola 2 — Trazabilidad SDLC ejecutable y baseline industrial mínima cerrada

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-27 adds a dependency-free, read-only heuristic architecture/code drift detector and closure artifacts. It introduces no external dependency, network call, provider, storage backend or destructive action.

pass_criteria: Architecture drift detector produces non-destructive findings.
Critical schemas validate through existing gateways.
block_criteria: Phase A is marked closed without operational Schema Validator.
Phase A is marked closed without executable Traceability Engine.
Documentation confuses real state with target/future capabilities.
A new dependency is added without ADR.
risks: Architecture/code drift detection is heuristic and may require alias tuning.
It does not replace manual architecture review.
It must not block on minor naming differences without configuration.
Phase A closure is a baseline, not final product readiness.
